components.name: MarkdownMessage
components.description: Render Markdown content with syntax highlighting and math support.

props.name: customRenderers
props.description: Optional renderers keyed by language for code blocks.

props.name: allowHtml
props.description: Allow raw HTML in markdown content. Defaults to false.

props.name: rendererOverrides
props.description: Override Markdown-It renderer rules (low-level). Keys are rule names (e.g. link_open, image).

components.name: ConfirmModal
components.description: Modal dialog for destructive or confirmation actions.

tools.name: callTool
tools.description: Call a tool by its name/alias only (no server prefix).

tools.name: callScript
tools.description: Run a workspace script by path.

tools.name: createSession
tools.description: Create a new conversation session. Supports optional context to preload the chat history.

tools.name: notify
tools.description: Show a toast notification to the user.
